primary_catalyst.description: NVIDIA announced $2 billion strategic investment in Marvell Technology and deep strategic partnership using NVLink Fusion to co-develop next-generation AI infrastructure, including custom XPUs, networking solutions, and silicon photonics collaboration. Marvell +13%, chip complex rallied. Quarter-end reversal off YTD low. Volume z +2.02 confirms institutional re-engagement.

secondary_catalysts.description: Quarter-end window dressing / Mag7 mean-reversion buying off YTD low
NVIDIA-Marvell NVLink Fusion press release from NVIDIA newsroom

force_attributions.rationale: $2B Marvell stake signals NVDA confidence in hyperscaler custom-silicon AI infrastructure demand through 2027+ â€” core demand-cycle story
NVLink Fusion + silicon photonics extends NVDA rack-scale platform moat at the packaging/networking layer â€” a supply-side advanced-packaging claim
Co-opting Marvell's custom-silicon capability into NVIDIA ecosystem directly blunts the Trainium/MTIA/Maia displacement threat â€” defensive against D2 competitive pressure
Quarter-end flows amplified the move; high volume (z +2.02) consistent with institutional re-engagement off YTD-low capitulation print

f1_attribution.rationale: Marvell is a Tier 4 adjacent AI supplier (custom silicon, networking, photonics) and the $2B NVDA stake is independent 3rd-party corroboration of NVDA's view of AI demand â€” high-signal validation event

notes: CRITICAL single-catalyst day. +5.59% / +3.17 close z / +2.02 vol z â€” the Marvell deal is the clear singular driver. Reversal off the YTD-low capitulation print made 3/26.
